milestones.title: 知识与角色真实性
milestones.vision: 让销售训练里的 AI 客户在当前 admin Persona / knowledge 配置 → session create → voice policy snapshot → realtime retrieval → knowledge-check / report / replay 这条真实业务代码链路上，持续表现出“懂价格、懂 ROI、懂竞品、懂实施风险、要证据”的追问能力，而不是停留在 prompt 文案层。
success_criteria: Admin Persona / knowledge changes still flow through the current session-create -> practice -> knowledge-check / report / replay business chain.

The learner/admin-visible knowledge status vocabulary remains the live seven-status contract (`no_knowledge_base`, `disabled`, `not_triggered`, `kb_not_ready`, `search_failed`, `miss`, `hit`) rather than collapsing into generic miss/error labels.
Persona pressure direction, objection focus, claim-truth, and replay/report conclusions stay stable across turns and reconnect on one same-session evidence line.
The final same-session proof chain now reaches replay and highlights truthfully after background finalization instead of stalling behind `[SESSION_NOT_COMPLETED]`.

key_risks.risk: Rewriting M003 planning state could desync existing completed slices from the rendered roadmap.
key_risks.whyItMatters: If DB sync resets slice completion state, milestone validation would be working against false progress instead of the real shipped state.

key_risks.risk: S06 could appear complete on disk but remain invisible to GSD validation because the parent slice/task rows never existed in DB.
key_risks.whyItMatters: Milestone validation/close-out would keep failing structurally even though the code and artifacts are already done.

proof_strategy.riskOrUnknown: Can the current admin Persona/knowledge -> practice -> canonical report chain produce one honest same-session objection-heavy proof on live routes?
proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: A real same-session objection-heavy proof on current routes with explicit degraded-state visibility.

proof_strategy.riskOrUnknown: Can sales sessions keep immediate end status=scoring yet still unlock same-session replay/highlights truthfully?
proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: Immediate lifecycle end stays scoring, background finalization promotes the same session to completed when canonical evidence is readable, replay/highlights unlock on that same session, and unfinished sessions remain blocked.

milestones.verification_contract: Focused backend proof stays on `POST /api/v1/practice/sessions`, `GET /api/v1/practice/sessions/{id}/knowledge-check`, `GET /api/v1/practice/sessions/{id}/report`, `GET /api/v1/sessions/{id}/replay`, and `GET /api/v1/sessions/{id}/highlights`, plus the current owning modules `backend/src/common/api/practice.py`, `backend/src/common/conversation/api.py`, `backend/src/common/conversation/replay.py`, and `backend/src/common/conversation/session_evidence.py`.
milestones.verification_integration: Integration proof must continue to trace one real current admin Persona/knowledge configuration through session creation, learner practice runtime, knowledge-check, canonical report, replay, and highlights on the same session rather than mixing sessions or helper-only seams.
milestones.verification_operational: Keep the proof on the current localhost learner route family with same-host cookies, inspect persisted `PracticeSession.status` / `report_status`, and treat `sales_session_finalized` plus replay/highlights 200 responses as the authority that background finalization completed truthfully.
milestones.verification_uat: Human/UAT verification is satisfied by one real same-session objection-heavy route proof on current product surfaces, with explicit distinction between canonical evidence availability and optional enhanced-report degradation.
definition_of_done: All six roadmap slices are represented in GSD DB state and the rendered M003 roadmap matches the completed filesystem truth.
The accepted admin Persona/knowledge → practice → knowledge-check → report → replay route family is still the single milestone authority line.
Validation can evaluate M003 against fresh S06 proof without slice/DB drift blocking the milestone.
milestones.requirement_coverage: Covers R010 directly across S01-S06. S01 locked the accepted route family and status vocabulary, S02 froze Persona pressure into session snapshots, S03 persisted unresolved objection evidence across turns/reconnect, S04 unified claim-truth semantics across runtime/report/replay, S05 proved the live objection-heavy same-session chain and documented the scoring/replay blocker, and S06 retired that blocker by unlocking same-session replay/highlights after background finalization without weakening the unfinished-session gate.
milestones.boundary_map_markdown:
### S01 → S02

Produces:
- The confirmed admin Persona/knowledge detail → practice session create → `voice_policy_snapshot` authority chain.
- The current live knowledge status vocabulary on user-visible surfaces: `no_knowledge_base`, `disabled`, `not_triggered`, `kb_not_ready`, `search_failed`, `miss`, `hit`.
- The ownership line that keeps KB-lock `blocked_no_kb` / `blocked_not_ready` / `blocked_search_failed` / `blocked_empty` plus retrieval detail like `hit_keyword_fallback` inside runtime diagnostics (`kb_lock_status`, `kb_lock_last_status`, `runtime_metrics.knowledge_retrieval.last_status`) instead of promoting them to current report status.

Consumes:
- nothing (first slice)

### S01 → S03

Produces:
- Accepted inspection surfaces for runtime / retrieval truth: practice page, knowledge-check, report, replay, admin Persona detail, and admin knowledge detail.
- The blocker rule that missing entrypoints force inventory/spike instead of execution.

Consumes:
- nothing (first slice)

### S02 → S03

Produces:
- A snapshot-backed Persona pressure model that is frozen into the session and survives reconnect.
- Stable runtime Persona context that can be combined with multi-turn objection tracking.

Consumes from S01:
- Locked entry chain and current knowledge status vocabulary.

### S03 → S04

Produces:
- Unresolved objection / promised proof / next proof request facts across turns.
- Cross-turn evidence needed for unsupported-claim / evidence-pending / evidence-backed judgments.

Consumes from S02:
- Persona pressure model.

### S04 → S05

Produces:
- One shared claim-truth contract for realtime, report, and replay on current routes.
- A same-session comparison line for live objection-heavy proof and degraded-state inspection.

Consumes from S03:
- Multi-turn objection ledger.

### S05 → S06

Produces:
- One honest same-session proof showing the current objection-heavy chain reaches practice, knowledge-check, and canonical report, plus the concrete scoring-finalization blocker (`status="scoring"`, `[SESSION_NOT_COMPLETED]`, `report_generation_failed [NO_STAGE_RESULTS]`, `no_scoring_context_available`).
- Browser/runtime artifact paths and guardrail evidence that S06 can reuse to prove the replay/highlights unlock on the same accepted chain.

Consumes from S04:
- Shared claim-truth contract already aligned across runtime, knowledge-check, report, and replay surfaces.

milestones.title: 复盘与学习闭环增强
milestones.vision: 让用户与主管在现有 report / replay / history 业务入口上完成“训练 → 报告 → 回放 → 关键片段 → 针对性复练”的学习闭环。所有学习证据都必须来自统一 session evidence / replay / presentation review authority line，而不是再造一套生成式学习系统。
success_criteria: 用户可以从现有 `/practice/{sessionId}/report` 直接定位主问题对应的关键片段，并看到为什么这是关键片段、怎样更好表达。
现有 replay / highlights surfaces 不再只是 good/bad 标签，而是能解释关键回合、阶段、原因和替代表达。
sales 与 presentation 都在现有 report / replay 入口上形成更强学习闭环；PPT 至少能落到页级 / 要点级学习证据。
学习闭环增强不引入第二套事实线；所有解释、跳转和再练参数都来自现有 unified evidence / replay / report surfaces。

key_risks.risk: 当前 replay / highlights 虽然存在，但学习价值仍偏弱：能看，不一定能学。
key_risks.whyItMatters: 如果只是在现有页面上继续堆展示信息，M004 会变成视觉增强而不是学习闭环增强。

key_risks.risk: 报告知道主问题，不代表用户能立刻跳到对应轮次或对应页面。
key_risks.whyItMatters: 没有 report → replay → retry 的强锚点，用户知道问题也很难转成下一次行动。

key_risks.risk: 参考表达如果不受控，可能重新引入事实漂移或“标准答案幻觉”。
key_risks.whyItMatters: 学习参考一旦脱离当前材料和统一证据线，可信度会下降并伤害用户对系统的信任。

key_risks.risk: PPT 报告虽然已经 scenario-aware，但页级学习证据是否足以支持真实纠偏还未证明。
key_risks.whyItMatters: 如果 presentation 仍停在总评，用户无法知道该重讲哪一页、为什么重讲。

proof_strategy.riskOrUnknown: highlights / replay 不够解释性
proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: 现有 replay/highlight contract 能稳定表达关键回合、原因、阶段、上下文和替代表达

proof_strategy.riskOrUnknown: report 不能直接带到关键证据
proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: 现有 report 页可以深链到 replay 的关键 turn / marker，而不是让用户手工查找

proof_strategy.riskOrUnknown: 看完报告后仍回不到下一练
proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: `main_issue` / `next_goal` 能转成现有 create-session surfaces 上的一条具体 re-practice launch

proof_strategy.riskOrUnknown: PPT 学习仍停在总评
proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: presentation 报告 / 回放可以按页指出漏讲、讲偏、讲长、禁用词和价值点覆盖

proof_strategy.riskOrUnknown: 学习链是否真的可用
proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: 至少一条 sales 和一条 PPT 路径完成训练 → 报告 → 回放 → 再练的 live UAT

milestones.verification_contract: Focused contract tests must lock replay / highlight / report / retry-entry / presentation-review schemas on the current authority line. New learning semantics cannot rely on freeform UI inference alone.
milestones.verification_integration: Integration verification must exercise the real report → replay → highlight detail → retry create-session chain for sales, and the report → replay → page evidence chain for presentation, on the current product routes.
milestones.verification_operational: Degraded states such as no highlights, not evaluable sessions, enhanced-report missing, and presentation evidence gaps must remain visible and explainable on the existing report/replay/history surfaces.
milestones.verification_uat: Human verification must prove that a learner and a supervisor can answer ‘why was this wrong, what should change next, and where is the evidence’ using the current report/replay entrypoints without extra tooling.
definition_of_done: report / replay / highlights 在现有用户入口上形成一条可学习证据链，而不是各自独立存在。
用户可以从报告直接跳到关键片段，并直接发起针对主问题的再练。
PPT 训练具备页级 / 要点级学习证据，至少能支持“在哪页、哪类问题、为何要重讲”的判断。
主管可以利用现有 report / replay / highlights surfaces 做带教，而不需要从长文总结里二次提炼。
至少一条 sales 与一条 PPT 路径完成“训练 → 报告 → 回放 → 再练”的真实验收。
milestones.requirement_coverage: Covers R011 directly by turning completed sessions into reusable learning evidence on the existing report/replay/history entry chain. Partially reinforces R005, R006, and R008 by making single-session report conclusions, supervisor coaching evidence, and PPT review materially more actionable. Leaves broader governance and manager workflow questions for M005.
milestones.boundary_map_markdown:
### S01 → S02

Produces:
- A learning-evidence contract on the existing replay/highlight authority line: reason, stage, context, suggested response, and stable anchors.
- Shared vocabulary between replay/highlight evidence and report conclusions.

Consumes:
- nothing (first slice)

### S01 → S03

Produces:
- Stable evidence objects that can be referenced by a retry intent.
- A clear mapping from issue family to concrete evidence turn/page.

Consumes:
- nothing (first slice)

### S01 → S04

Produces:
- A shared explanation structure that presentation page-level evidence can reuse.
- A consistent way to describe why a moment matters across sales and PPT.

Consumes:
- nothing (first slice)

### S02 + S03 → S05

Produces:
- A sales learning loop on current routes: report → replay → retry.
- Evidence-rich anchors for live end-to-end proof.

Consumes from S02:
- report → replay deep links.

Consumes from S03:
- issue-driven retry launch contract.

### S04 → S05

Produces:
- A presentation learning loop on current routes: report → replay → page evidence.
- Page-aware evidence packs for live UAT.

Consumes from S04:
- page-level evidence contract.

milestones.title: 后台治理与规模化运营
milestones.vision: 基于已经证明可信的训练与学习闭环，把现有 admin 业务代码入口做成真正可运营的管理链路：主管能在系统内看对数据、指定重点、提醒、复查结果；运营能看清 Persona / knowledge / presentation / runtime 配置的影响与健康。
success_criteria: 现有管理入口 `web/src/app/admin/analytics/page.tsx`、`web/src/app/admin/users/page.tsx`、`web/src/app/admin/users/[id]/page.tsx`、`backend/src/admin/api/interventions.py` 不再各讲各的话，全部站到当前 unified evidence / sales semantics 基线上。
主管可以在现有 admin surfaces 内完成最小闭环：看见问题 → 指定训练重点 / 提醒 → 查看完成情况 → drill into report/replay 复查结果。
知识库、Persona、PPT、voice runtime 这些已经存在的运营资产具备版本、健康、影响范围与最近变更的统一治理视角。
组织级看板与导出基于真实业务代码与训练事实，而不是旧 weighted formulas、placeholder 数据或环境/工具链杂项。

key_risks.risk: `backend/src/common/analytics/admin_analytics_service.py` 仍有 legacy weighted score 计算。
key_risks.whyItMatters: 如果先做更多管理功能而不先修这条事实线，主管会在错误信号上做决定。

key_risks.risk: `backend/src/admin/api/interventions.py` 的 reminder 目前更像日志，而不是完整 workflow。
key_risks.whyItMatters: 系统内没有最小管理闭环，就只能继续依赖线下表格与口头提醒。

key_risks.risk: knowledge/persona/presentation/runtime 等资产的治理视角仍然分散。
key_risks.whyItMatters: 长期运营后会越来越难判断哪些配置真的在生效、哪些改动导致质量波动。

key_risks.risk: “未来集成”如果过早升格为主目标，会打散现有 admin 业务整治。
key_risks.whyItMatters: M005 必须先把当前 admin 价值链做实，再谈 SSO/CRM/企业微信等边界。

proof_strategy.riskOrUnknown: 管理分析口径仍然漂移
proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: 当前 admin analytics / user drill-in 不再混用 legacy weighted score，而是站到现有 projection/evidence 语义上

proof_strategy.riskOrUnknown: 主管动作仍停留在线下或日志
proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: 现有 intervention 入口支持 focus assignment、reminder status 与结果回连

proof_strategy.riskOrUnknown: 资产治理仍然分散
proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: 现有 knowledge/persona/presentation/runtime 页面可以展示影响范围、健康异常与最近变更

proof_strategy.riskOrUnknown: 团队节奏仍要靠手工拼接
proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: 团队 / 部门 issue buckets、风险名单与一周节奏包能从现有 admin 数据链生成

proof_strategy.riskOrUnknown: 管理链路是否真的够用
proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: 至少一条真实团队管理路径完成系统内 UAT

milestones.verification_contract: Focused tests must lock current admin analytics, user drill-in, intervention, and asset-governance contracts to the unified evidence line. New management behavior cannot rely on placeholder scores or freeform UI-only semantics.
milestones.verification_integration: Integration verification must exercise the current admin analytics → user detail → intervention → report/replay drill-in chain, plus current asset-governance and export paths.
milestones.verification_operational: Operational verification must keep asset impact, health, blocker, and permission boundaries visible on current admin/support surfaces instead of hidden in logs.
milestones.verification_uat: Human verification must prove that a supervisor can complete a real weekly management loop using the current admin routes without falling back to spreadsheets or external systems.
definition_of_done: 现有 admin 业务入口全部建立在 unified evidence / current sales semantics 上，不再混用 legacy weighted score 或 placeholder 数据。
主管能在系统里完成最小但完整的动作闭环：看问题、指定重点、提醒、查看完成、复查结果。
运营能从现有资产页面看清楚关键配置的健康、影响面与最近变更，不再只能“改了再看”。
团队 / 部门周节奏基于真实训练事实可生成、可 drill-in、可导出。
至少一条真实团队管理路径完成系统内 UAT。
milestones.requirement_coverage: Covers R012 directly by turning existing admin entrypoints into a sustainable operating chain. Partially advances deferred manager-workflow work under R017 without jumping to broad organization tooling. Leaves mobile and external-system expansion (R018/R019) as later boundary work rather than this milestone’s core scope.
milestones.boundary_map_markdown:
### S01 → S02

Produces:
- A unified admin analytics / user-drill-in semantic baseline on the current evidence line.
- Shared issue-family, evaluability, degradation, and score semantics reused by intervention workflows.

Consumes:
- nothing (first slice)

### S01 → S03

Produces:
- A trustworthy usage / impact baseline that asset-governance screens can reuse.
- Alignment between admin analytics and learner/supervisor evidence surfaces.

Consumes:
- nothing (first slice)

### S02 → S04

Produces:
- Focus assignment / reminder / status / result-linkage contracts on the current admin routes.
- Manager actions that can be aggregated into a weekly operating view.

Consumes from S01:
- Unified admin semantics.

### S03 → S04

Produces:
- Asset health / impact / recent-change context that can be shown in weekly operating packs.
- A governance line for knowledge/persona/presentation/runtime assets.

Consumes from S01:
- Usage / impact baseline.

### S04 → S05

Produces:
- A real team workflow on the current admin entrypoints: analytics → drill-in → action → review.
- Operating-pack outputs and acceptance surfaces.

Consumes from S02:
- Manager workflow contract.

Consumes from S03:
- Asset-governance surfaces.

milestones.vision: 基于 M005 已验证的后台治理链路，不再继续加新页面，而是把现有 admin analytics / users / asset pages 背后的共享 contract、shared parser、service seam、asset registry 和 regression proof 抽出来，降低后续新增 admin 功能、资产类型和治理视图时的复制成本与语义漂移风险。
success_criteria: Current admin drill-in context and linked-asset parsing are each owned by one shared frontend seam reused by the shipped admin route family.
`governance_summary` and `linked_asset_changes` travel through typed backend/client/UI contracts instead of page-local weak parsing.
Supervisor intervention write-side rules and latest-evaluable result semantics are extracted behind dedicated services with no behavior drift on current APIs/pages.
Current asset governance and linked-asset consumers resolve the existing four asset types through one registry/adapter seam.
A full backend + web regression pack proves the refactor preserves the validated M005 admin route family while lowering extension cost for future work.

key_risks.risk: Typing and parser refactors could silently drift validated M005 admin semantics even if pages still render.
key_risks.whyItMatters: R012 is already validated; M006 must harden reuse without weakening truthful score/evaluability/governance behavior.

key_risks.risk: Supervisor-workflow extraction could over-generalize `manager_interventions` and delay practical value.
key_risks.whyItMatters: The current chain works because it is minimal and route-anchored; an abstract-but-wrong workflow engine would add complexity without helping future extension.

key_risks.risk: Registry/adapter work could create another layer of indirection without actually lowering extension cost.
key_risks.whyItMatters: If adding a new asset type or drill-in entry still requires multi-page edits, the refactor would only hide duplication rather than remove it.

proof_strategy.riskOrUnknown: Can frontend admin drill-in and linked-asset consumption become single-source helpers without behavior drift?
proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: Manager-lite, users list, analytics, and user detail all build/parse the same current-route context and linked-asset structures through shared helpers, with focused web regression proof.

proof_strategy.riskOrUnknown: Can governance and linked-asset contracts be made end-to-end typed instead of page-local `Record<string, unknown>` parsing?
proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: Backend schemas, API client normalization, and admin UI components share typed governance/linked-asset contracts while existing asset pages and analytics/user detail behavior stay intact.

proof_strategy.riskOrUnknown: Can supervisor workflow rules be extracted from routes without breaking the latest-evaluable result semantics?
proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: Create/update/remind/result-resolution logic moves behind services while integration tests still prove latest evaluable completed session wins over thin later sessions.

proof_strategy.riskOrUnknown: Will a shared asset registry actually reduce future change surface across current asset types?
proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: Knowledge/persona/presentation/runtime all resolve labels, admin paths, and governance references through one registry/adapter seam, backed by support/runtime and asset-governance tests.

proof_strategy.riskOrUnknown: Will the refactored seams still support the full shipped admin route family without drift?
proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: A full backend + web regression pack passes on current M005 admin surfaces after pages switch to shared adapters/hooks.

milestones.verification_contract: Verification must prove behavior preservation, not just file movement: focused web tests for manager-lite / analytics / users / user-detail must stay green while shared helpers replace local copies; backend integration/contract tests must confirm admin analytics, interventions, asset governance, and support runtime contracts retain the same semantics after service/schema extraction.
milestones.verification_integration: Integration proof stays on the current shipped route family: `/admin/analytics*`, `/admin/users*`, `/admin/knowledge`, `/admin/personas`, `/admin/presentations`, and `/admin/voice-runtime`. Every slice must close by showing the new seam is actually consumed by those current routes/pages, not merely introduced alongside them.
milestones.verification_operational: Operationally, the milestone is only done if a future extension point gets cheaper in a measurable way: adding a new drill-in entry should touch one shared drill-in helper, and adding a new asset type should primarily touch one registry/adapter seam plus tests instead of multiple pages/services.
milestones.verification_uat: UAT should replay the current M005 supervisor/operator loop after the refactor: weekly operating-pack → user drill-in → focus/reminder → canonical report/replay review, plus asset-page governance and runtime-fault linked-asset inspection. The goal is to prove that current operators see the same behavior while the implementation underneath becomes more reusable.
definition_of_done: Current admin drill-in context, linked-asset parsing, and governance summary shapes each have one shared source of truth instead of page-local duplicates.
Backend write-side intervention rules and read-side intervention-result rules live behind dedicated service seams, not primarily inside route handlers.
Current four asset types resolve labels/admin paths/governance references through a shared registry/adapter seam.
Current admin pages consume shared adapters/helpers for operating-pack, runtime-fault-linked assets, and user drill-in context without changing shipped behavior.
Focused backend/web regression packs for M005 surfaces pass after the refactor, and the new seams are documented in project knowledge/research artifacts.
milestones.requirement_coverage: No new capability requirement is introduced. M006 hardens the architecture behind validated R012 so future admin/governance additions can extend existing seams instead of copying page-local logic. The milestone also reduces drift risk for future work that reuses the same projection-backed evidence line, supervisor workflow semantics, and asset-governance contracts.
milestones.boundary_map_markdown:
## In Scope
- **Backend shared seams**
  - `backend/src/common/analytics/*`
  - `backend/src/support/services/*`
  - `backend/src/admin/api/*`
  - shared response schemas under `backend/src/common/*/schemas.py` and related admin/support contracts
- **Frontend shared seams**
  - `web/src/lib/api/*`
  - new shared admin helpers/adapters under `web/src/lib/admin/*`
  - `web/src/components/admin/*`
  - current admin pages under `web/src/app/admin/*`
- **Proof surfaces**
  - current `/admin/analytics*`, `/admin/users*`, `/admin/knowledge`, `/admin/personas`, `/admin/presentations`, `/admin/voice-runtime`

## Out of Scope
- No new standalone admin console or new route family
- No learner-facing route redesign
- No new external notification provider
- No generic workflow engine or plugin platform beyond seams needed by current routes
- No change to current evidence semantics except preserving and hardening them through shared abstractions

milestones.title: 实时教练闭环正式封板
milestones.vision: 把现有 realtime coaching 能力在当前 learner/runtime/report/replay 路由族上做成可证明完成的正式闭环，并把旧 M002 remediation 事实线和工件线正式吸收到 M007，结束“产品看起来差不多完成，但 live proof 和 milestone authority 还没真正收口”的状态。
success_criteria: On the current `/practice/{sessionId}` learner route, coach degraded/resumed is explicit, understandable, and non-disruptive while training remains usable.
One real localhost sales session stays coherent from live coaching through `/practice/{sessionId}/report` and `/practice/{sessionId}/replay` on the same issue/goal family.
The remaining M002 remediation facts and artifacts are formally absorbed into M007 so closure authority is singular and truthful.
Realtime coaching can be marked complete only when both live product proof and project-artifact reconciliation pass in the same validation cycle.

key_risks.risk: Coach degraded/resumed may still drift across reconnect, restore, runtime diagnostics, and learner UI.
key_risks.whyItMatters: A one-shot status message is not enough; if restored state reverts to healthy or stale degraded after reconnect, the milestone still lies about coach health.

key_risks.risk: Realtime coaching direction and completed-session report/replay conclusions may still come from different evidence paths.
key_risks.whyItMatters: If the same session says one thing during practice and another thing after completion, realtime coaching is not truly closed.

key_risks.risk: Old M002 remediation artifacts may continue to compete with M007 for closure authority.
key_risks.whyItMatters: If requirement, roadmap, validation, summary, and state keep pointing at different milestone stories, downstream agents will keep misreading project truth.

proof_strategy.riskOrUnknown: Coach degraded/resumed may still drift across reconnect, restore, runtime diagnostics, and learner UI.
proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: The existing learner/runtime surfaces expose one canonical coach-health truth line that survives reconnect and recovery without falsely resetting to healthy.

proof_strategy.riskOrUnknown: Realtime coaching direction and completed-session report/replay conclusions may still come from different evidence paths.
proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: One real localhost sales session stays coherent from live coaching through `/practice/{sessionId}/report` and `/practice/{sessionId}/replay` on the same issue/goal family.

proof_strategy.riskOrUnknown: Old M002 remediation artifacts may continue to compete with M007 for closure authority.
proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: Requirement ownership, roadmap, validation, summary, and state all point at M007 as the formal closure authority without falsifying historical M002 facts.

milestones.verification_contract: Focused backend/frontend tests must lock the coach-health runtime contract, reconnect behavior, and same-family report/replay assertions; artifact checks must confirm requirement, roadmap, validation, summary, and state no longer contradict the delivered closure truth.
milestones.verification_integration: Run one real localhost sales session on the current learner/runtime/report/replay route family and prove the same session carries coherent realtime coaching, degraded/resumed visibility, final report conclusions, and replay conclusions.
milestones.verification_operational: Reconnect, restore, capability failure, and short upstream jitter must degrade only the coach surface while keeping training usable, and recovery must not silently reset truth surfaces to a false healthy state.
milestones.verification_uat: Use the current learner flow to verify that the degraded/resumed status is understandable to a learner, that training can continue while coach health is degraded, and that the same finished session tells a consistent story across practice, report, and replay.
definition_of_done: Coach degraded/resumed is explicitly visible on the existing `/practice/{sessionId}` learner surface without breaking the training mainline.
Reconnect, restore, runtime diagnostics, and learner UI all agree on coach health instead of drifting after recovery.
At least one real localhost sales session proves realtime coaching, final report, and final replay stay on the same issue/goal family without cross-session stitching.
The remaining M002 remediation facts and artifacts are formally absorbed into M007, and closure authority is no longer split between an old M002 remediation narrative and the live product truth.
`.gsd/REQUIREMENTS.md`, M007 roadmap/context, validation, summary, and state no longer contradict the delivered closure status.
R009 advances to validated only if both product truth and artifact reconciliation pass together.
milestones.requirement_coverage:
Covers: R009.
Partially reinforces: R002, R005, R011.
Leaves for later: R016, R017, R018, R019.
Orphan risks: none — the remaining unreconciled risks are exactly coach-health truth, same-session closure proof, and authority/artifact reconciliation, all owned inside M007.
milestones.boundary_map_markdown:
## Boundary Map

### S01 → S02
Produces:
- `coach_health` canonical runtime contract on existing learner/runtime surfaces: `healthy | degraded | resumed` plus stable reason/message semantics.
- Handler/runtime snapshot invariants across `backend/src/sales_bot/websocket/stepfun_realtime_handler.py`, `backend/src/sales_bot/websocket/enhanced_handler.py`, and `backend/src/common/api/practice.py` so reconnect and diagnostics reuse one truth line.
- Learner-facing practice-page rendering contract on the current right-panel surface, with explicit-but-non-blocking degraded/resumed visibility.

Consumes:
- Current sales realtime coaching, pacing, and completed-session alignment semantics from shipped M002/M004 code.

### S01 → S03
Produces:
- Explicit runtime evidence for coach degraded/resumed transitions that later artifact reconciliation can reference truthfully.
- A stable definition of what counts as a live coach-health proof versus a partial/mock proof.

Consumes:
- Current practice/report/replay route family and existing runtime diagnostics seam.

### S02 → S03
Produces:
- Same-session closure evidence pack tying `/practice/{sessionId}` realtime coaching direction to `/practice/{sessionId}/report` and `/practice/{sessionId}/replay` conclusions.
- Regression-verifiable invariants for issue-family / goal-family coherence on one real localhost sales session.

Consumes from S01:
- Canonical coach-health runtime contract and learner-visible degraded/resumed behavior.

### S01 + S02 + S03 → S04
Produces:
- Final M007 validation input: live proof, regression proof, and authority reconciliation of requirement / roadmap / validation / summary / state.
- The authoritative closure record stating that realtime coaching is now honestly sealed.

Consumes from S01:
- Coach-health truth line across runtime, reconnect, and learner UI.

Consumes from S02:
- Same-session end-to-end closure proof on existing practice/report/replay routes.

Consumes from S03:
- M002 remediation artifact absorption and M007 authority switch.

milestones.vision: 在现有训练、knowledge-check 与 canonical report 路由族上，给每条 knowledge-backed session 建立一条小而稳定、可审计、可对照的 retrieval truth：是否触发检索、何时检索、命中了什么、为什么 miss 或失败，以及这些事实如何同时解释 knowledge-check 与 report 的结论。
success_criteria: A knowledge-backed training session durably records retrieval facts that answer whether retrieval happened, what was queried, what was returned, and why it missed or failed.
The same session's `/knowledge-check` and canonical `/report` endpoints describe the same retrieval truth and degradation tier.
The learner-facing `/practice/{sessionId}/report` page shows retrieval facts through the existing report surface rather than a new audit/debug UI.
M008 advances R022 and R023 directly while laying a truthful foundation for R027 and R028 without overreaching into M009/M010 scope.

key_risks.risk: Current runtime retrieval metrics are aggregate-heavy and provider-shaped, so naïvely exposing them could create an unstable long-term contract.
key_risks.whyItMatters: If the ledger shape is too raw or too noisy, later report provenance and audio-audit milestones will be anchored to brittle payloads instead of durable facts.

key_risks.risk: Adding retrieval truth to report through any seam other than `SessionEvidenceService` would reintroduce route drift between knowledge-check and canonical report.
key_risks.whyItMatters: The whole milestone fails if `/knowledge-check` and `/report` can still tell different stories about the same session.

key_risks.risk: UI work could drift into a new audit/debug surface instead of strengthening the shipped learner report path.
key_risks.whyItMatters: The user asked to retire fake credibility in the current route family, not to add a second place where engineers can inspect internals.

proof_strategy.riskOrUnknown: Can the system persist a minimal, bounded retrieval ledger on the real runtime path without inventing a new storage model?
proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: A knowledge-backed session durably stores provider-neutral retrieval entries (hit/miss/failure, query, counts, KB bindings, timestamps/errors) inside the existing runtime metrics snapshot.

proof_strategy.riskOrUnknown: Can knowledge-check and canonical report share one retrieval truth instead of parallel interpretations?
proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: The same completed session returns matching retrieval facts through `/knowledge-check` and canonical `/report`, with `SessionEvidenceService` acting as the report authority.

proof_strategy.riskOrUnknown: Can the learner-facing report explain retrieval facts clearly on the shipped surface without a new debug route?
proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: The existing `/practice/{sessionId}/report` UI renders shared retrieval facts and layered degradation copy for hit/miss/failure/weak evidence, backed by focused UI tests and route-family proof.

milestones.verification_contract: Run focused backend unit/integration/contract coverage on the runtime-metrics write seam, `SessionEvidenceService`, and practice evidence contracts; verify the milestone only when the same session can be interrogated through both `/knowledge-check` and canonical `/report` with matching retrieval facts.
milestones.verification_integration: Use the current FastAPI route family only: persist a knowledge-backed session, query `/api/v1/practice/sessions/{id}/knowledge-check` and `/api/v1/practice/sessions/{id}/report`, and confirm both surfaces expose the same retrieval ledger summary and degradation classification.
milestones.verification_operational: Prove layered failure visibility for at least the main operational tiers — not triggered, miss, retrieval failure, and hit-but-weak — so the system never silently collapses back into an abstract 'knowledge support' conclusion.
milestones.verification_uat: On `/practice/{sessionId}/report`, verify the learner can see whether KBs were bound, whether retrieval occurred, and the concrete hit/miss/failure explanation for that same session using the shipped report experience.
definition_of_done: A bounded session-level retrieval ledger exists on the current runtime persistence path and is locked by focused backend tests.
`runtime_diagnostics` and `SessionEvidenceService` both consume the persisted ledger, and contract/integration tests prove parity on the same session.
The existing report page and shared frontend evidence helpers render retrieval truth and layered degradation wording from the canonical API contract.

One shipped route-family proof demonstrates that a real or faithfully exercised knowledge-backed session can explain binding, retrieval outcome, and report interpretation without new routes or temporary logs.
milestones.requirement_coverage:
- **R022** → primary owner **S01**, support **S02**: 在现有 runtime metrics/persistence seam 上落地 session-level retrieval ledger，形成 durable retrieval truth。
- **R023** → primary owner **S02**, support **S03**: `/api/v1/practice/sessions/{id}/knowledge-check` 与 canonical `/api/v1/practice/sessions/{id}/report` 共享同一条 retrieval truth，而不是各读各的状态。
- **R027** *(foundation only for M010)* → primary owner **S02**, support **S03**: canonical report projection 增加 retrieval fact basis，为后续 report provenance 铺底，但本里程碑不做全量出处引用模型。
- **R028** *(foundation only for M010)* → primary owner **S03**, support **S02**: 系统对未触发、miss、failure、hit-but-weak 的分层解释在 API 与 learner-facing report 上保持稳定。
- **Explicitly out of scope**: 原始音频留痕 / OSS / object storage（M009），完整 report evidence reference model 与 `used_in_reasoning` 证明（M010），新 audit/debug route 或后台。
milestones.boundary_map_markdown:
### Runtime write boundary
- `stepfun_internal_knowledge_searcher.py` / shared knowledge retrieval path remains the write-side trigger.
- `stepfun_helpers.update_knowledge_runtime_metrics(...)` and `stepfun_runtime_metrics_helpers.persist_runtime_metrics_to_session(...)` stay the persistence seam.
- New durable fact lives inside `voice_policy_snapshot.runtime_metrics.knowledge_retrieval.retrieval_ledger` as a bounded, provider-neutral summary.

### Shared read boundary
- `runtime_diagnostics.build_session_runtime_diagnostics(...)` reads the persisted ledger for `/knowledge-check`.
- `SessionEvidenceService.build_projection(...)` reads the same persisted ledger and exposes report-facing retrieval facts.
- No second report-only retrieval source is introduced.

### API / UI boundary
- `backend/src/common/api/practice.py` keeps the existing shipped route family.
- `web/src/lib/api/types.ts`, `web/src/lib/session-evidence.ts`, and `web/src/app/(user)/practice/[sessionId]/report/page.tsx` consume the shared retrieval truth.

### Non-goals / exclusions
- No new audit console, debug route, or separate retrieval table in this milestone.
- No inference of `used_in_reasoning` from weak evidence.
- No audio-storage or report-citation expansion beyond the minimum retrieval-facts foundation.

milestones.vision: M009 把训练音频从"训练过程中的流式输入/输出副产物"升级为真正的审计资产：浏览器在训练过程中持续录制用户原始语音并直传阿里云 OSS，服务端只负责签名和元数据登记；学员能在现有 report/replay 路径里反查和播放自己的原始训练录音证据。
success_criteria: 一场真实训练的原始音频在训练过程中持续留痕到 OSS（训练未结束时已有递增的 segment metadata），而不是训练结束后才尝试补存。
浏览器直连 OSS 完成音频上传和下载，服务端日志和 network 只出现签名请求与 metadata 登记，不出现音频内容经 FastAPI 中转。
学员能在现有 /practice/{sessionId}/report 和 /sessions/{id}/replay 路径里看到原始录音留痕状态，并播放自己训练过程中的原始录音 segment。
训练中断、上传失败、签名过期等情况下，前序已上传 segment 仍有稳定留痕，当前失败状态在 report/replay 上有明确降级文案。

key_risks.risk: 当前 backend/src 没有任何 OSS client 或配置 wiring；OSS signed URL + CORS 组合需要真实 bucket 验证，不能只靠本地 mock。
key_risks.whyItMatters: 如果签名 URL/CORS 配置有误，浏览器直传在本地开发环境无法走通，整个第一个 slice 的 proof 就无法成立。

key_risks.risk: 训练是多次 push-to-talk 流，useAudioRecorder.stopRecording() 每次会关闭 stream；浏览器 MediaRecorder 编码格式在不同浏览器/codec 组合下可能不稳定。
key_risks.whyItMatters: 如果 MediaRecorder 方案不可靠，需要回退到 PCM→WAV segment 方案，会改变 S01 的实现路径和复杂度。

key_risks.risk: per-segment signing/register 的服务端请求量可能在短按录音频繁的训练场景下偏多。
key_risks.whyItMatters: 需要平衡'每次发言一段'与'固定 timeslice 段'之间的请求频率，避免签名风暴。

proof_strategy.riskOrUnknown: OSS signed PUT + CORS + 浏览器播放组合是否可靠
proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: 浏览器能用服务端签发的 PUT signed URL 成功上传音频 segment 到 OSS，且上传后的对象可通过 GET signed URL 在 <audio> 元素中播放。

proof_strategy.riskOrUnknown: 浏览器并行 audit recorder 是否能稳定捕获 push-to-talk 语音
proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: 并行 audit recorder 在现有 useAudioRecorder 的 MediaStream 上独立工作，不影响主 websocket PCM 链路，且每个 push-to-talk 段都能产出独立 segment。

proof_strategy.riskOrUnknown: 训练中断后前序 segment 是否仍可读
proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: 模拟训练中断（websocket 断开、页面关闭），已上传的 segment metadata 和 OSS 对象仍可通过 report/replay route 正常读取。

milestones.verification_contract: Upload lease endpoint 不返回音频内容，只返回 signed PUT URL + object key。Metadata register endpoint 只接受已上传 segment 的元数据登记，不接受音频上传。只有 session owner / admin 能拿到 playback signed GET URL。Report 和 replay payload 对同一 session 暴露一致的 audio audit summary。
milestones.verification_integration: Backend contract tests 验证 upload lease → direct PUT → metadata register → signed GET 全链路。Frontend focused tests 验证 practice page live audit state、report page raw-audio section、replay page raw-audio playback。Live UAT 验证训练进行中 OSS segment 递增、中途打断后前序可读、结束后 learner 可播放。
milestones.verification_operational: 训练中断时已有 segment 保留明确 metadata 状态。上传失败时当前 segment 标记为 failed 且 report/replay 显示降级文案。签名过期时前端能感知并重新申请。缺失音频的 session 不会呈现为'完整录音可用'。
milestones.verification_uat: 以 learner 身份进入训练页，完成 3+ 轮 push-to-talk 后结束训练，在 /practice/{sessionId}/report 页面看到原始录音留痕状态和可播放入口。在 /sessions/{id}/replay 页面能播放同一场训练的原始录音 segment。中途打断后前序段仍可播放。
definition_of_done: 所有 slices 完成，每个 slice 有 SUMMARY + UAT artifacts
Backend focused tests 通过（upload lease / metadata register / signed GET / replay integration）
Frontend focused tests 通过（practice live state / report audio section / replay audio playback）
Live localhost proof 存在（训练中 OSS segment 递增 + 中断后可恢复 + learner report/replay 可播放）
真实实现代码存在于 .gsd/ 之外（backend OSS service + migration + frontend audit recorder + report/replay UI）
R024/R025/R026 全部至少达到 mapped 状态
milestones.requirement_coverage:
R024 (训练原始音频持续留痕落 OSS): primary S01, supporting S02, S03
R025 (浏览器直连 OSS 服务端不做中转): primary S01, supporting S02
R026 (学员在现有 report/replay 可查原始录音): primary S02, supporting S03
R027 (报告结论可回到 audio evidence): foundation only in S02, full closure deferred to M010
R028 (降级分层说明): supporting S03 (audio degradation layer)

milestones.vision: M010 closes the "fake-credible report" gap by attaching evidence provenance to key conclusions (main_issue, next_goal, claim_truth) and establishing a unified degradation taxonomy across report, replay, and knowledge-check routes. The user will see not just "what went wrong" but "why we believe this" — backed by retrieval, transcript, and audio evidence on the same authority seam that already powers the shipped product.
success_criteria: A completed sales session exposes the same conclusion-evidence bundle (main_issue, next_goal, claim_truth each pointing to their retrieval/transcript/audio sources) on report, replay, and knowledge-check with identical vocabulary.
Retrieval, transcript, and audio evidence degradation are explained with a single layered taxonomy that is consistent across all three route families — no route-family-specific wording.

When retrieval or audio evidence is missing or degraded, the system does not silently present conclusions as fully supported; instead it explicitly marks the conclusion as partially sourced and names which evidence layer is missing.
No new report-only heuristic or second truth source is introduced; all provenance stays on SessionEvidenceService + build_retrieval_facts + build_session_audio_audit.
Frontend report/replay pages render conclusion provenance and degradation through shared helpers in session-evidence.ts, not through page-local derivation.

key_risks.risk: Evidence reference model could bloat the existing projection payload and break existing consumers if not kept strictly additive.
key_risks.whyItMatters: SessionEvidenceService.build_projection() is consumed by report, replay, history, admin, and trends — any non-additive change would cascade regressions.

key_risks.risk: Knowledge-check uses a different code path (runtime_diagnostics) from report/replay (session_evidence projection); provenance vocabulary could drift between them.
key_risks.whyItMatters: The whole point of M010 is unified vocabulary across route families; if knowledge-check speaks a different provenance language, the milestone fails its core promise.

key_risks.risk: Enhanced-report failures may be conflated with canonical evidence degradation, causing false alarm or missed real gaps.
key_risks.whyItMatters: M009 already established that optional enhancement failures must remain optional; M010 must not let them overwrite canonical evidence signals.

proof_strategy.riskOrUnknown: Can the same conclusion evidence bundle be produced identically by projection and runtime-diagnostics?
proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: One completed session with retrieval hit, transcript messages, and audio segments will produce the same evidence_references payload on GET report, GET replay, and GET knowledge-check.

proof_strategy.riskOrUnknown: Can degradation be expressed in a single taxonomy that all three routes understand?
proof_strategy.retireIn: S02 contract tests + S03 frontend rendering
proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: A session with partial evidence (e.g. retrieval miss + audio available) produces consistent degradation explanations across all routes, and the frontend renders them identically.

milestones.verification_contract: Backend contract tests in test_practice_evidence_contract.py prove report↔replay↔knowledge-check parity for conclusion evidence and degradation vocabulary.
milestones.verification_integration: A real completed sales session with retrieval attempts, transcript messages, and audio segments produces consistent provenance across all three route families through live HTTP calls in integration tests.
milestones.verification_operational: Degraded sessions (missing retrieval, missing audio, missing transcript evidence) produce explicit degradation tokens that the frontend renders without silent fallback.
milestones.verification_uat: Report page shows conclusion provenance (which evidence sources support each conclusion). Replay page shows the same provenance. Knowledge-check shows the same degradation vocabulary. A session with partial evidence shows explicit missing-layer indicators.
definition_of_done: All slices complete with SUMMARY.md and UAT.md artifacts.
Contract tests pass proving report↔replay↔knowledge-check parity for conclusion evidence_references and degradation taxonomy.
Frontend focused tests pass for report and replay provenance rendering.
No new breaking changes to existing report/replay/knowledge-check payload fields — all new fields are additive.
SessionEvidenceService remains the single report authority; no second truth source introduced.
milestones.requirement_coverage:
R023 (retrieval parity) — maintained by S01 contract tests extending existing M008 parity guarantees with provenance cross-references.
R026 (learner audio evidence) — maintained by S01; audio provenance is one layer of the evidence reference model.
R027 (conclusion provenance) — S01 builds the evidence reference model, S02 adds degradation, S03 renders it.
R028 (layered degradation) — S02 owns the unified taxonomy, S03 renders it on frontend.
milestones.boundary_map_markdown:
```boundary-map
S01: backend/src/common/conversation/session_evidence.py, backend/src/common/conversation/runtime_diagnostics.py, backend/tests/contract/test_practice_evidence_contract.py, backend/src/common/db/schemas.py
S02: backend/src/common/conversation/session_evidence.py, backend/src/common/conversation/runtime_diagnostics.py, backend/src/common/api/practice.py, backend/tests/contract/test_practice_evidence_contract.py
S03: web/src/lib/api/types.ts, web/src/lib/session-evidence.ts, web/src/app/(user)/practice/[sessionId]/report/page.tsx, web/src/app/(user)/practice/[sessionId]/replay/page.tsx
```

milestones.vision: 把当前 patch 化的知识问答链升级成数据库驱动、可配置、可审计、可调试的后端系统能力；用 Haystack 作为 retrieval/reranking/evaluation 执行底座，同时保留项目自有的控制面、answerability 逻辑与 learner-facing contracts。
success_criteria: 知识问答逻辑不再主要依赖 handler/prompt 中的硬编码 case，而是由数据库驱动配置和统一引擎编排控制。
Haystack 只作为执行底座，项目仍完整掌握 query policy、ranking policy、answerability、audit/debug 与 rollout。
现有 realtime/report/replay learner-facing contracts 继续可用，且 answer diagnostics/citations 不回归。
系统具备后续可持续优化能力：配置可改、行为可审计、问题可调试、效果可评估。

key_risks.risk: 把 Haystack 直接当业务真相源，导致项目失去对 query/ranking/answerability 的治理控制。
key_risks.whyItMatters: 用户明确要求该能力必须数据库驱动、可审计、可调试，不能把关键规则重新埋进框架默认逻辑。

key_risks.risk: 迁移过程中破坏现有 realtime/report/replay learner contracts。
key_risks.whyItMatters: 这几条 surface 已经接上 diagnostics/citations，任何兼容性回归都会直接影响用户感知和复盘能力。

key_risks.risk: 重构后仍然无法把产品介绍类 query 的命中稳定性和排序质量拉起来。
key_risks.whyItMatters: 如果只换框架不解决实体解析、业务排序、coverage 判断，系统只会从一套 patch 迁移到另一套 patch。

proof_strategy.riskOrUnknown: Haystack 是否适合作为执行底座而不吞掉项目控制面。
proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: 引擎 seam 能用 Haystack 跑 retrieval/reranking/evaluation，同时由项目 DB 配置驱动 query profile、ranking profile、answerability profile。

proof_strategy.riskOrUnknown: 产品介绍类 query 是否能在新的 planner/reranker 下更快、更稳地命中。
proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: progressive retrieval plan + early-stop + business reranker 能通过 focused regression 证明产品介绍类 query 不再无脑 fan-out 串行拖慢整轮。

proof_strategy.riskOrUnknown: 统一引擎输出能否不破坏 realtime/report/replay 现有 contracts。
proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: compat seam 能让 learner-facing diagnostics/citations 继续工作，并新增 audit/debug 能力。

proof_strategy.riskOrUnknown: 该能力是否可持续优化，而不是一次性重构。
proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: DB 配置、audit run、evaluation harness、rollout flag 能形成后续调参与回滚机制。

milestones.verification_contract: 通过 focused unit/integration suites 证明：control plane schema、config repository、entity resolver、intent planner、Haystack adapter、reranker、answerability、assembler、audit repo、compat seam 均满足契约。
milestones.verification_integration: 通过 realtime/report/replay 现有契约测试与新增 engine compatibility tests 证明 learner-facing contract 未回归。
milestones.verification_operational: 通过 debug API、audit run step 持久化、feature flags/dual-run 证明该能力可审计、可调试、可灰度。
milestones.verification_uat: 在本地 running app 中复测产品介绍类 query、辅导类 query 与降级场景，确认用户体验与 diagnostics 符合预期。
definition_of_done: 新的 KnowledgeAnswerEngine 与数据库控制面 schema 已落库并有迁移。
realtime handler、runtime diagnostics、report/replay compatibility seam 已接上引擎输出。
focused backend suites 与 web compatibility suites 通过。
至少一组产品介绍类 query 的 live 行为验证完成：不胡说、不异常截断、命中时能给 citation，证据不足时能明确降级。
milestones.requirement_coverage: 本 milestone 覆盖现有知识问答问题的系统化重构：不再把 query 规则、排序偏好、answerability 判断写死在 handler/prompt 中，而是通过 DB 驱动配置、统一引擎编排、审计落库与评测回归把该能力提升为稳定的后端基础设施。它延续当前 runtime/report/replay diagnostics 面，不破坏 learner-facing surface，同时为后续持续优化 query understanding、entity resolution、ranking、coverage answerability 提供统一执行与治理框架。
milestones.boundary_map_markdown:
- **Control Plane（项目自有）**：DB 配置、版本管理、审计日志、debug API、rollout flags
- **Execution Plane（Haystack 底座）**：retrieval pipeline、ranker pipeline、evaluation primitives
- **Compatibility Seam（项目自有）**：把引擎输出映射到 realtime/report/replay 现有 contracts
- **Out of Scope（本 milestone 不做）**：前台可视化配置后台、复杂 LLM planner、全量多模型 A/B 平台

milestones.vision: 让一个刚入职的销售新人第一次打开系统能顺畅走完"登录 → 看懂首页 → 选对训练 → 完成首练 → 看到报告 → 想再练一次"，中间不会因为硬编码、空壳按钮、缺失入口或白屏而卡住。
success_criteria: 登录页有
忘记密码
可走通完整重置流程（含后端API + 前端表单 + 邮件服务抽象）
首页
早安，{真实用户名}
读 currentUser，版本号动态读取
侧边栏包含
历史记录
导航入口
Learner 侧所有页面有 error boundary，不再白屏
首页所有空壳按钮（下载报告/设定目标/分享分析/筛选）要么有真实功能要么移除
Profile 页语速设置持久化到后端，通知开关隐藏
排行榜有评分规则说明
有统一的意见反馈入口
企业微信按钮标注
即将支持
或移除
个人中心可修改密码

key_risks.risk: 忘记密码涉及邮件服务配置，本地开发/演示环境可能无法验证完整流程
key_risks.whyItMatters: 如果邮件服务不可用，密码重置流程无法端到端验证

key_risks.risk: 首页空壳按钮改动可能影响已有交互逻辑
key_risks.whyItMatters: 需要确保移除或实现空壳按钮时不破坏现有功能

proof_strategy.riskOrUnknown: 邮件服务可用性
proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: 忘记密码完整流程可端到端走通（含本地 console mock fallback）

proof_strategy.riskOrUnknown: 空壳按钮改动不破坏现有功能
proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: 首页所有可交互元素都有明确响应，无空壳按钮

milestones.verification_contract: Frontend focused tests (vitest) + backend API contract tests (pytest)
milestones.verification_integration: Frontend components interact with real API client; backend routes tested via pytest
milestones.verification_operational: App starts without crash; all pages load without white screen
milestones.verification_uat: New user sees personalized greeting; sidebar has history entry; error pages show friendly messages
definition_of_done: All slice deliverables complete
All 10 success criteria verified against live behavior
Existing validated requirements (R001-R028) regression verified
New requirements (R029-R038) status updated correctly
milestones.requirement_coverage: Covers: R029-R038 (new). Confirms no conflict: R022/R023 (active retrieval truth). Leaves for later: R016-R019 (deferred).
milestones.boundary_map_markdown:
### S01 → S02
Produces: forgot-password/reset-password API routes, currentUser read on dashboard
Consumes: nothing (first slice)

### S02 → S03
Produces: sidebar with history entry, error boundaries, feedback entry, clean dashboard buttons
Consumes: S01 currentUser fix

### S03 → S04
Produces: voice_speed_preference persistence, notification toggle removed, scoring explanation, change-password
Consumes: S01 auth API, S02 sidebar

milestones.vision: 把 SYSTEM_AUDIT_REPORT 中的所有条目分成"已修 / 真实缺口 / 需 discovery / 当前 defer"，形成可信 backlog；同时锁定后续所有 repair slice 的验证命令集合，确保后续执行模型只处理真实问题，不被 stale finding 误导。
success_criteria: SYSTEM_AUDIT_REPORT 每个条目都有明确 disposition（already-fixed / actionable-now / needs-discovery / deferred-by-product / contradicted-by-project-knowledge）
每个后续执行 slice 至少有一个已存在的 focused verification command 可复用
stale finding 与 deferred feature 明确标注来源（如 PROJECT.md 桌面优先首发策略），不混入真实缺陷

key_risks.risk: 审计文档与真实代码状态漂移严重，直接执行会浪费工时
key_risks.whyItMatters: 如果不在执行前先纠偏，后续 milestone 会把已修项当新 bug 做，或把产品策略 defer 项当缺陷修

key_risks.risk: 验证命令集合不完整导致后续 slice 做了但无法证明
key_risks.whyItMatters: audit 覆盖面大，没有统一验证基线会让每个 slice 的 done-when 变成主观判断

proof_strategy.riskOrUnknown: 审计文档漂移程度
proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: 每个 audit section 的条目都经过代码/KNOWLEDGE/REQUIREMENTS/M012 对照，漂移条目被明确标注

proof_strategy.riskOrUnknown: 验证覆盖是否足够支撑后续 5 个执行 milestone
proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: auth/dashboard/history/profile/practice/lifecycle/websocket/admin 每个领域至少有 1 条可执行的 focused verification command

milestones.verification_contract: Backend focused pytest 串行执行（repo-root `backend/venv/bin/python -m pytest -c backend/pyproject.toml ...`），避免 `.coverage` SQLite 竞争。前端使用 `npm --prefix web test -- --run ...`。
milestones.verification_integration: 归一化矩阵文件存在且包含所有 audit section 的 disposition 条目标记；验证命令集合覆盖后续 milestone 涉及的所有主要模块。
milestones.verification_operational: N/A — 本 milestone 不涉及运行时服务变更，仅产出分析文档。
milestones.verification_uat: 人工核对归一化矩阵中不存在未归类条目。
definition_of_done: SYSTEM_AUDIT_REPORT 每个条目都落到某个 disposition 类别
验证命令集合文档覆盖 auth/dashboard/history/profile/practice/lifecycle/websocket/admin
stale finding 和 deferred 条目有明确冲突来源说明
milestones.requirement_coverage: ["Covers: 无新 requirement（本 milestone 是分析/基线阶段）", "Supports: 后续 M014-M018 的所有 requirement mapping", "Leaves for later: 具体修复的 requirement 在后续 milestone 中映射"]
milestones.boundary_map_markdown:
### S01 → S02

Produces:
- `.gsd/plans/GSD_PLAN_system-audit-repair.md` 中的归一化矩阵（每个 audit 条目的 disposition + 证据路径 + 后续 slice 归属）

Consumes:
- `SYSTEM_AUDIT_REPORT.md`、`.gsd/PROJECT.md`、`.gsd/REQUIREMENTS.md`、`.gsd/KNOWLEDGE.md`、M012 路线图

### S01 → 后续所有 milestone

Produces:
- 可信的 audit normalization matrix，后续执行模型直接消费

Consumes:
- 当前代码状态、已有 GSD 事实

milestones.title: Learner 入口与体验闭环补齐
milestones.vision: 把首页 / auth / history / profile / practice 里真正影响首次使用和复练的缺口补齐，确保第一次打开系统能顺畅走完"登录 → 看懂首页 → 选对训练 → 完成首练 → 看到报告 → 想再练一次"。
success_criteria: 首页不再有硬编码内容或空壳 CTA，新人能看到最小 onboarding 指引并找到真实训练入口
forgot/reset 体验完整，profile 内有可理解的修改密码路径
语速偏好刷新后保留或有明确移除/隐藏策略
learner shell 有统一反馈/帮助入口
practice 首屏有训练前目标预告，中断时有可理解指引

key_risks.risk: 容易把产品策略问题（移动端 / export / self-registration）误拉进 learner 修复范围
key_risks.whyItMatters: scope 膨胀会把 launchability 修复拖成全产品重构

key_risks.risk: auth seam 改动影响现有登录路径兼容性
key_risks.whyItMatters: password reset/formalization 必须保持现有登录 flow 不 regression

key_risks.risk: practice preflight 和中断恢复涉及实时状态语义
key_risks.whyItMatters: websocket 暂停/恢复状态机复杂，改文案需要和现有 overlay/banner 模式兼容

proof_strategy.riskOrUnknown: 首页空壳动作范围是否可控
proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: 所有空壳 CTA 有明确 disposition（实现/深链/禁用/删除），report export 不被误引入

proof_strategy.riskOrUnknown: auth 正式化是否保持现有登录兼容
proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: forgot/reset 走正式持久化 token，现有登录路径仍有 focused tests 通过

proof_strategy.riskOrUnknown: practice preflight 是否能在现有 overlay 模式内实现
proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: 训练前预告用现有 overlay/banner 实现，不新增复杂路由

milestones.verification_contract: Frontend: `npm --prefix web test -- --run ...`。Backend: `backend/venv/bin/python -m pytest -c backend/pyproject.toml ... -x -q`。Backend proof 串行执行。
milestones.verification_integration: 浏览器人工验证：首页首屏 CTA 至少一条通向真实训练入口；从首页/profile/history 能找到帮助入口；practice 首屏有训练目标预告。
milestones.verification_operational: 本地 `cd backend && PYTHONPATH=src venv/bin/uvicorn main:app --port 3444` + `npm --prefix web dev` 联合验证 auth flow 与 practice preflight。
milestones.verification_uat: 人工验证新人首次使用路径：登录 → 看懂首页 → 选对训练 → 完成/中断练习 → 找到帮助。
definition_of_done: 首页无主按钮空壳，首屏有最小 onboarding 指引
forgot/reset 正式化（token 持久化 + migration + lifecycle 校验）
profile 内有可理解的修改密码路径，语速偏好刷新后保留或明确移除
learner 至少有一个稳定的反馈/帮助入口
practice 首屏有训练前目标预告，暂停/恢复/结束失败有清晰指引
test-mic 不以普通 learner 功能暴露
milestones.requirement_coverage: ["Covers: R029（忘记密码自助完成）、R030（首页不硬编码）、R031（登录页忘记密码入口）", "Partially covers: R032（侧边栏历史入口在 S03 shell 补全中处理）", "Leaves for later: 自助注册、完整帮助中心、消息通知系统"]
milestones.boundary_map_markdown:
### S01 → S02

Produces:
- 首页清理后的 CTA 收口策略表与实现代码（空壳动作已 disposition）
- `web/src/components/dashboard/*` 可能新增的 onboarding 组件

Consumes:
- M013/S01 的归一化矩阵（确认哪些首页问题是真的）

### S02 → S03

Produces:
- 正式化的 forgot/reset auth seam（token 持久化、migration、lifecycle 校验）
- profile 内可理解的修改密码路径
- 语速偏好持久化或明确移除策略

Consumes:
- `web/src/app/(auth)/*`、`backend/src/common/auth/api.py`、`backend/src/common/auth/service.py`

### S03 → S04

Produces:
- learner shell 统一反馈/帮助入口

Consumes:

### S04 → 后续

- 暂停/恢复/结束失败的用户可理解文案

Consumes:
- `web/src/app/(user)/practice/[sessionId]/page.tsx`、`usePracticeSessionLifecycle`、`usePracticeWebSocket`

milestones.title: Frontend hygiene 与 learner shell 保护收口
milestones.vision: 系统性替换 console / alert / confirm / window.location 等不一致模式，补齐 learner 壳层 error/loading 覆盖，把大面积、低层级、跨页面的一致性问题独立收口，而不是扩成重写整个前端。
success_criteria: 业务页面与 hooks 中的散落 console、原生弹窗和直接浏览器跳转被统一收口到共享前端 seam。
learner 核心路由族具备可验证的 error/loading fallback，且剩余 responsive/a11y/timezone 风险有显式 disposition。
后续前端修复可以从共享 debug/router/dialog seam 继续推进，而不必重新在页面本地发明模式。

key_risks.risk: 前端一致性整治容易扩成重写整个壳层
key_risks.whyItMatters: 一旦脱离 audit-repair 主线，排队里程碑会被视觉/架构重整吞掉。

key_risks.risk: 清理 console/弹窗/跳转时误删真实诊断信号或破坏关键确认动作
key_risks.whyItMatters: 会让后续调试与高风险交互更难证明，形成表面干净但不可靠的状态。

proof_strategy.riskOrUnknown: 前端一致性整治容易扩成重写整个壳层
proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: 共享 debug seam 足以承接高噪声业务日志，不需要做全前端重构。

proof_strategy.riskOrUnknown: 清理 console/弹窗/跳转时误删真实诊断信号或破坏关键确认动作
proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: 删除确认与 auth redirect 在非中断式交互模式下仍可用，且 route family focused tests 保持通过。

milestones.verification_contract: 按 M013 基线执行 focused web proof：先用 rg 扫描 console / alert / confirm / window.location 剩余使用点，再运行 history、practice report/replay、persona admin 与 login focused Vitest。
milestones.verification_integration: 真实整合面是 learner route family 与 admin 高风险页面；验证不能只停留在 grep，需要让 focused 页面测试覆盖 shell 行为。
milestones.verification_operational: 无需新增后台进程或部署操作；保留 instrumentation/dev-only 例外并确认浏览器端诊断仍可见。
milestones.verification_uat: 人工确认至少一个删除确认动作、一个 auth redirect 场景和一个 learner route fallback 在 UI 上真实可理解。
definition_of_done: 共享 debug seam、dialog/router seam 和 learner route fallback 已落到现有页面，而不是只停在规则文档。
focused web proof 通过，且剩余 responsive/a11y/timezone 风险被明确记录为 baseline 或后续项。
没有把移动端/i18n/dark-mode 等 deferred 议题伪装成当前已修复工作。
milestones.requirement_coverage: 承接 M013 归一化矩阵中的前端 hygiene 与 learner shell 风险项：1.1.1、1.1.2、1.1.3、15.3、16.1、16.2、16.3；继续保持移动端与 i18n deferred 边界。
milestones.boundary_map_markdown:
### S01 → S02

Produces:
- 共享 debug/observability seam 与 console 例外边界
- 可复用的业务日志分类规则

Consumes:
- nothing (first slice)

### S02 → S03

Produces:
- 非中断式确认/跳转模式
- admin/learner 页面可复用的 router/auth-handler 交互约束

Consumes:
- S01 已建立的 debug seam 与日志边界

milestones.title: Auth / API / admin security contract hardening
milestones.vision: 把 password reset、鉴权模式、错误响应、RBAC、日志脱敏从“能用”升到“可依赖”，让认证与错误表面成为后续治理和扩展的稳定基线。
success_criteria: password reset、auth recovery 与现有登录路径共享一个可证明的正式 contract，不再依赖 request-time DDL 或隐式过渡实现。
高频 API surface 返回统一 outward 错误 shape，frontend client 不再 page-local 猜测错误结构。
高风险 admin 接口与日志出口完成第一轮权限/脱敏收口，并有 focused backend proof。

key_risks.risk: auth 与错误契约收口会触碰 shared seam
key_risks.whyItMatters: 如果边界不清，容易把 learner 可用登录路径打坏，导致回归面过大。

key_risks.risk: RBAC 与日志脱敏容易变成无边界的全仓审计
key_risks.whyItMatters: 不先锁定高风险接口和高风险出口，就会把里程碑拖成长期治理工程。

proof_strategy.riskOrUnknown: auth 与错误契约收口会触碰 shared seam
proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: password reset 正式化后现有登录兼容路径仍可证明通过 focused auth tests。

proof_strategy.riskOrUnknown: RBAC 与日志脱敏容易变成无边界的全仓审计
proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: 高风险 admin APIs 与日志出口已有权限/脱敏 proof，不需要把所有 backend surface 一次性重写。

milestones.verification_contract: 按 M013 baseline 执行 repo-root backend focused proof：auth 登录/重置、presentations/practice contract、admin users 模型与权限 tests 串行运行。
milestones.verification_integration: 真实整合面是 auth API、presentation/practice contract 和 admin 高风险 route family；需要跨 service + route + tests 一起证明。
milestones.verification_operational: 需要确认 migration、持久化 token 与日志出口在当前 backend 启动方式下仍可运行；不得引入环境依赖要求用户手动补救。
milestones.verification_uat: 人工抽查 forgot/reset 一条正向路径和一条拒绝路径的 outward 文案/shape 是否仍然可信。
definition_of_done: password reset、API 错误 shape、admin 安全边界都落到真实代码与 focused backend proof，而不是只写治理建议。
鉴权/错误/日志相关高风险出口至少完成一轮真实收口与可重复验证。
兼容现有登录与 learner/admin 入口，不引入新的 page-local 错误猜测或 request-time DDL。
milestones.requirement_coverage: 承接 M013 归一化矩阵中的 2.1.1、2.1.2、2.1.3、2.2.1、3.1.1、4.1.2、4.2.1；把 auth、错误契约与 admin 安全面从 audit finding 提升到可依赖基线。
milestones.boundary_map_markdown:
### S01 → S02

Produces:
- 正式 password-reset token 持久化与 lifecycle contract
- auth recovery 的邮件/限流 seam

Consumes:
- nothing (first slice)

### S02 → S03

Produces:
- 统一 API 错误 outward shape
- frontend client 可复用的错误解析约束

Consumes:
- S01 建立的 auth contract 与测试基线

milestones.title: Realtime contract 与 concurrency proof 收口
milestones.vision: 围绕 session lifecycle、practice websocket、上传并发与资源竞争建立明确的事实线和修复边界，把高风险但证据不足的问题从表面 patch 转成可证伪、可维护的 contract。
success_criteria: session lifecycle 的竞态与终态收敛策略有可重复 proof，后续不再依赖经验性防抖或猜测。
practice websocket 的 reconnect/backpressure/interrupt 行为在现有主链路上被 focused tests 锁定。
上传/资源竞争/锁需求被沉淀成 evidence-backed discovery 结论，而不是继续停留在泛化 audit 风险。

key_risks.risk: 并发与实时问题容易被表面 patch 掩盖
key_risks.whyItMatters: 如果没有 race proof 和 runtime contract，后续修复会反复回归。

key_risks.risk: websocket/上传风险跨前后端与资源边界
key_risks.whyItMatters: 一处修补可能掩盖另一处竞争面，需要先分清真实 seam 和想象风险。

proof_strategy.riskOrUnknown: 并发与实时问题容易被表面 patch 掩盖
proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: pause/resume/end 的竞态路径有可重复测试与清晰收敛策略，而不是经验式防抖。

proof_strategy.riskOrUnknown: websocket/上传风险跨前后端与资源边界
proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: practice websocket 的 reconnect/backpressure/interrupt contract 已被 focused proof 锁定，能区分真实复杂度问题与文件过大错觉。

proof_strategy.riskOrUnknown: websocket/上传风险跨前后端与资源边界
proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: presentation upload/resource race 的真实竞争点与无需当前处理的想象风险被区分清楚。

milestones.verification_contract: 按 M013 baseline 串行执行 lifecycle backend tests、websocket focused web tests，以及 presentation contract/integration proofs。
milestones.verification_integration: 需要真实覆盖 SessionLifecycleService、practice websocket route 与 presentation upload/replace surface 的现有主链路。
milestones.verification_operational: 必须确认并发/重连修复不会破坏现有 practice/report/replay 解锁语义；不新增额外守护进程。
milestones.verification_uat: 人工复核至少一个 practice 中断/恢复场景和一个 upload/replace 风险结论，确保文档/测试与运行时认知一致。
definition_of_done: session lifecycle、practice websocket 和 upload/resource race 至少各有一条真实证据线，不再停留在 audit 猜测。
并发与重连策略经过 focused proof，且没有破坏现有 report/replay/practice 主链路。
需要 discovery 的风险项被诚实沉淀为结论/后续项，而不是被伪装成已经修好。

milestones.title: Performance / dependency / recovery baselines
milestones.vision: 把审计里“像问题但未证实”的性能、安全、容灾类条目转成有证据的后续 backlog，让慢查询、索引、依赖漏洞、许可证、备份恢复现状都有真实基线，而不是被伪装成已知 fix。
success_criteria: 数据库性能、依赖治理与备份恢复三类 audit 风险都被转成 evidence-backed baseline，而不是继续停留在猜测。
依赖/运维类 proof 诚实区分已执行命令、需要前置条件和 runbook 文件基线，不伪造功能性验证。
后续优化或治理里程碑可以直接消费这些基线结论与文档，不需要重新做仓库级盘点。

key_risks.risk: governance/discovery 工作容易写成空泛文档
key_risks.whyItMatters: 如果没有真实命令、真实路径和真实前置条件，后续执行仍然无法落地。

key_risks.risk: 性能与安全风险缺少现网证据时容易被误判成必须立刻修复
key_risks.whyItMatters: 会把优化猜测和真实缺口混在一起，重新制造 audit backlog 漂移。

proof_strategy.riskOrUnknown: 性能与安全风险缺少现网证据时容易被误判成必须立刻修复
proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: query/index/slow-path 风险已被分成有证据的后续项与仍需真实 Postgres/runtime 证据的猜测项。

proof_strategy.riskOrUnknown: governance/discovery 工作容易写成空泛文档
proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: 依赖扫描、license 与升级门禁至少有真实入口命令或明确前置条件，不是口头建议。

proof_strategy.riskOrUnknown: governance/discovery 工作容易写成空泛文档
proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: backup/recovery/runbook 只写当前部署现状可执行内容，并有文件存在与关键词 proof。

milestones.verification_contract: 按 M013 baseline 执行 analytics focused backend tests、`npm audit --prefix web`、`backend/venv/bin/python -m pip_audit`（若环境具备），以及 runbook 文件存在/grep proof。
milestones.verification_integration: 整合面主要是 analytics/query paths 与仓库级治理入口，而不是新的用户功能路径。
milestones.verification_operational: runbook 与依赖治理 proof 必须写明当前可执行命令、前置条件、负责人/证据位置；不可依赖未配置的外部平台假设。
milestones.verification_uat: 人工走查 backup/recovery runbook 一遍，确认步骤和路径符合当前仓库/部署现实。
definition_of_done: 性能、依赖治理、runbook 三类项都形成真实基线或可执行文档，而不是继续停留在 audit 想象风险。
所有治理类 proof 都诚实区分“已跑过”“需要前置条件”“仅有文档基线”，不伪装成 feature verification。
后续优化/治理工作可以直接从基线结论起新 slice，而不是重做仓库级盘点。

slices.title: 多轮会话稳定化与运行时状态收口
slices.demo: 桌面端客户演练可以稳定完成多轮来回，不再出现第二轮就坏、结束流程混乱、状态丢失等核心问题。

slices.title: 训练证据落库与报告事实源统一
slices.demo: 一次训练的转写、阶段、评分、模糊表达、关键异议等事实能被一致落库，报告与回放引用同一事实源。

slices.title: 单次报告可读化（学员 + 主管）
slices.demo: 学员训练完能看懂结论和建议；主管打开单次报告能直接看到好坏结论、卡点、说虚 / 说错内容、没接住的异议、下次训练重点。

slices.title: 知识库更新即生效链路
slices.demo: 培训负责人 / 管理员更新公司标准 PPT 或产品资料后，下一次新建训练即可使用更新后的内容，并且能看到生效诊断。

slices.title: 销售价值表达与异议处理基线
slices.demo: 客户演练不再停留在泛泛闲聊，而是围绕真实产品价值、客户收益、价格 / 竞品 / 证据类追问进行训练和判断。

slices.title: 连续变化视图（主管判断是否进步）
slices.demo: 主管能看到某人最近几次训练是否进步、反复卡在哪类问题、是否该切换训练重点。

slices.title: PPT 对练会后统一复盘可用化
slices.demo: 新人完成一轮 PPT 对练后，可以拿到围绕真实 PPT 价值点的统一复盘、评分和建议；先不要求实时打断。

slices.title: 桌面端发布验收与可观测性收口
slices.demo: 关键桌面端路径完成端到端验收，主要失败模式可定位、可回放、可诊断，达到“可以真实给团队用”的上线门槛。

slices.title: 实时评分与训练页销售语义对齐
slices.demo: 用户在训练页看到的实时评分维度、阶段标签和建议文案已经与当前销售价值表达 / 异议处理 rubric 对齐，而不是旧的泛化评分面板。

slices.title: 提示节奏收口与单轮唯一动作卡
slices.demo: 多轮对话里每一轮只保留一个主要动作方向，重复阶段/模糊词/评分提示被节流和去重，不再刷屏。

slices.title: 阶段推进教练与下一轮规则闭环
slices.demo: 实时阶段、分维变化和动作卡能共同指向“下一轮该怎么问 / 怎么答 / 怎么推进”，而不是三套平行提示。

# S04: 训练中建议与报告结论一致性

**Completed sales sessions now share one stage-aware sales conclusion baseline across report, replay, history, and admin, and replay visibly shows the aligned coach conclusion that the report summarizes.**

## What Happened

S04 closed the remaining drift between ‘练中怎么教’ and ‘练后怎么总结’ for completed sales sessions without changing the public report/replay/websocket contract. T01 established a shared read-side seam in `common.effectiveness`: `resolve_sales_report_alignment(...)` uses persisted sales stage plus normalized dimension scores to derive the same sales-first `main_issue` / `next_goal` family that S03’s realtime coaching rule family points toward, while still falling back to existing evaluator semantics when sales evidence is insufficient. T02 then moved that alignment into the projection seam that all completed-session readers already trust. `SessionEvidenceService.build_projection(...)` now scans backward for the latest persisted message whose stage + score pair can actually align, overrides stale `main_issue` / `next_goal` only in the projection copy, and emits minimal diagnostics (`sales_alignment_used`, stage key, focus type, fallback reason) on `practice_session_evidence_projection_built`. That kept report, replay, history, and admin on one aligned baseline even when older `effectiveness_snapshot` values were stale or newer messages only carried partial `overall_score` snapshots.

During slice close I finished the missing T03 web carry-forward. Replay now renders a read-only “本场教练结论” block directly from the API’s aligned `main_issue` / `next_goal` before stage evidence, and `web/src/lib/session-evidence.ts` now translates the new S04 vocabulary (`evidence_gap`, `objection_handling_gap`, `next_step_gap`, `evidence_backing`, etc.) so replay and admin progress badges remain readable. The focused report/replay/admin tests were updated to reflect the aligned vocabulary, and a pre-existing report fallback assertion was corrected to wait for the asynchronous enhanced-report/highlights degraded copy instead of misreporting a UI regression. The resulting slice gives downstream S05/S06 a stable completed-session comparison line: realtime coaching can now be checked against report/replay/admin conclusions using one shared sales-first vocabulary and one diagnosable projection seam.

## Verification

Fresh slice-level verification passed after completing the missing T03 carry-forward and correcting the pre-existing async report fallback assertion. Exact commands run: `cd backend && /usr/bin/time -p venv/bin/python -m pytest -c pyproject.toml tests/unit/test_effectiveness_sales_report_alignment.py tests/unit/test_session_evidence_service.py tests/unit/test_replay_service.py tests/unit/test_history_service_evidence_projection.py`; `cd backend && /usr/bin/time -p venv/bin/python -m pytest -c pyproject.toml tests/unit/test_session_evidence_service.py -k 'sales_alignment or stale_snapshot or insufficient_sales_evidence' -vv`; `cd backend && /usr/bin/time -p venv/bin/python -m pytest -c pyproject.toml tests/unit/test_session_evidence_service.py -k 'insufficient_sales_evidence' -vv`; `cd backend && /usr/bin/time -p venv/bin/python -m pytest -c pyproject.toml tests/unit/test_effectiveness_sales_report_alignment.py -k 'insufficient_sales_evidence' -vv`; `cd backend && /usr/bin/time -p venv/bin/python -m pytest -c pyproject.toml tests/contract/test_practice_evidence_contract.py tests/integration/test_practice_evidence_flow.py tests/integration/test_sales_value_training_flow.py`; and `cd web && /usr/bin/time -p npm test -- --run 'src/app/(user)/practice/[sessionId]/report/page.test.tsx' 'src/app/(user)/practice/[sessionId]/replay/page.test.tsx' 'src/app/admin/users/[id]/page.test.tsx'`. All exited 0 on the final run. Observability was confirmed by the projection-diagnostic fields asserted in `backend/tests/unit/test_session_evidence_service.py` and by the replay/admin focused tests that render the aligned conclusion family visibly.

## Requirements Advanced

- R009 — S04 proved that completed sales sessions no longer let stale read-side snapshots drift away from the sales-first coaching focus family established in S03: projection, report, replay, history, and admin now share aligned `main_issue` / `next_goal` conclusions while preserving stable public contract keys.

## Requirements Validated

None.

## New Requirements Surfaced

None.

## Requirements Invalidated or Re-scoped

None.

## Deviations

Adjusted one pre-existing report-page async fallback assertion to wait for post-load degraded copy while finishing T03; otherwise the slice followed the written plan.

## Known Limitations

S04 aligns completed-session read surfaces only. It does not yet prove coach degraded / resume visibility during live training, and it does not itself supply the live end-to-end/UAT proof that one realtime suggestion and the final report stayed aligned inside the same session; those remain for S05 and S06.

## Follow-ups

S05 should reuse the new projection diagnostics when surfacing coach degraded / resume visibility so operators can distinguish ‘no coach issue found’ from ‘coach alignment unavailable’. S06 should run one live sales session that proves the realtime action card and final report/replay conclusion share the same issue/goal family for the same session.

## Files Created/Modified

- `backend/src/common/effectiveness/evaluator.py` — Added the shared `resolve_sales_report_alignment(...)` helper and aligned sales issue/goal vocabulary for completed-session read-side reuse.
- `backend/src/common/effectiveness/schemas.py` — Defined shared schemas for the report-alignment helper diagnostics and payload typing.
- `backend/src/common/effectiveness/__init__.py` — Exported the new sales report-alignment helper from the shared effectiveness boundary.
- `backend/src/common/conversation/session_evidence.py` — Made completed sales projections scan backward for the latest alignable sales evidence, override stale read-side conclusions, and emit alignment diagnostics on `practice_session_evidence_projection_built`.
- `backend/tests/unit/test_effectiveness_sales_report_alignment.py` — Locked discovery/evidence, objection handling, closing/next-step, and insufficient-evidence fallback behavior for the shared alignment helper.
- `backend/tests/unit/test_session_evidence_service.py` — Verified projection-side override/fallback behavior and the new alignment diagnostics fields.
- `backend/tests/unit/test_replay_service.py` — Proved replay reads the aligned sales conclusion instead of stale snapshot data.
- `backend/tests/unit/test_history_service_evidence_projection.py` — Verified history/progress readers reuse the aligned projection baseline for completed sales sessions.
- `backend/tests/contract/test_practice_evidence_contract.py` — Kept report/replay contract keys stable while asserting stale sales snapshots are overridden by aligned conclusions.
- `backend/tests/integration/test_practice_evidence_flow.py` — Proved completed-session report and replay stay aligned through the real API flow.
- `backend/tests/integration/test_sales_value_training_flow.py` — Updated the sales report integration proof to the current aligned-stage baseline.
- `web/src/app/(user)/practice/[sessionId]/replay/page.tsx` — Added the read-only “本场教练结论” block so replay shows the same aligned `main_issue` / `next_goal` family as report before stage evidence.
- `web/src/lib/session-evidence.ts` — Extended shared issue/goal label maps for S04 alignment vocabulary such as `evidence_gap`, `objection_handling_gap`, and `evidence_backing`.
- `web/src/app/(user)/practice/[sessionId]/replay/page.test.tsx` — Asserted replay renders the aligned coach conclusion and does not fall back to legacy `/messages` stitching.
- `web/src/app/(user)/practice/[sessionId]/report/page.test.tsx` — Updated sales fixtures to the aligned issue/goal vocabulary and fixed async degraded-copy assertions for enhanced-report/highlights fallback.
- `web/src/app/admin/users/[id]/page.test.tsx` — Verified admin progress badges remain readable for the new aligned sales issue/goal types.
- `.gsd/REQUIREMENTS.md` — Recorded that R009 is further advanced by S04’s completed-session alignment proof while remaining active pending S05/S06.
- `.gsd/KNOWLEDGE.md` — Captured the async-report-fallback test gotcha so future agents wait for degraded copy instead of misreporting a regression.
- `.gsd/PROJECT.md` — Refreshed project state to note that M002/S04 now aligns completed-session report/replay/admin/history conclusions to the realtime coaching family.
